articles.author: Cooper Worth
articles.title: How to watch Caitlin Clark, Indiana Fever vs Dallas in WNBA today, time, TV channel - Hawk Central
articles.description: Fans can see Caitlin Clark and the Indiana Fever face Paige Bueckers and the Dallas Wings in a WNBA game Saturday, May 9. Here's where to watch.
articles.content:
Caitlin Clark and the Indiana Fever will open the 2026 WNBA regular season by facing Paige Bueckers and the Dallas Wings on Saturday, May 9.
